sourcePage: Visa requirements for Saint Kitts and Nevis citizens

Afghanistan.notes: Visa isn't required if they born in Afghanistan or their parent is a national of Afghanistan or was born in Afghanistan.. ✓

Algeria.notes: Tourists to cities in the south of Algeria (Timimoun, Ghardaia, Ilizi, Djanet or Tamanraset) can obtain a visa upon arrival for a maximum of 30 days, but must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation. ✓

Antigua and Barbuda.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states;. ID card valid.

Armenia.notes: May apply for a visa on arrival only if holding a valid visa or valid permanent resident permit (resident card) issued by Australia, Belarus, Canada, Gulf Cooperation Council countries, Japan, New Zealand, Russia, Singapore, South Korea, European Union / Schengen Area member states, United Kingdom or United States.. X

Australia and territories.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa).. X

Austria.notes: 90 days during a 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Azerbaijan.notes: If holding a residence visa issued by the United Arab Emirates may obtain a 30-day tourist visa on arrival in Azerbaijan. must present their valid visa or residence permit along with their passport.. ✓

Barbados.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely.. ✓

Belgium.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Belize.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely.. ✓

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. X

Bhutan.notes: Must pay 100 USD per person per day for sustainable development fee. x

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: 90 days within any 180 days period. X

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days during a 180 days period following the date of the first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Canada.notes: Citizens of Saint Kitts and Nevis who have held a Canadian visa within the past 10 years or who currently hold a valid non-immigrant U.S. visa can apply for an eTA when arriving by air. They may not enter Canada by land or sea unless holding a valid visa.. X

Cape Verde.notes: Not available at all entry points.. X

China.notes: May obtain a visa upon arrival at Shenzhen (SZX) for a maximum of 5 days if traveling as tourists and must not leave Shenzhen during the stay.. X

Colombia.notes: 90 days – extendable up to 180-days stay within a one year period. ✓

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: Must be picked up at Port Bouet Airport in Abidjan. x

Croatia.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of the first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Denmark and territories.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Dominica.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states. ID card valid.

Dominican Republic.notes: Can be extended up to 120 days with fee. X

Equatorial Guinea.notes: Must arrive via Malabo International Airport, processing fee 75 USD. ✓

Estonia.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Ethiopia.notes: eVisa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport. x

Finland.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

France.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Georgia.notes: 90 days within any 180 days period. X

Germany.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Greece.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Grenada.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states. ID card valid.

Guyana.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely.. ✓

Hungary.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Iceland.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.. X

Italy.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Jamaica.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely.. ✓

Japan.notes: Holders of a residence permit in Australia, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, India, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Africa, Taiwan (Province of China), United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States. can apply for a single entry e-visa individually. The duration of stay for these jurisdictions is up to 90 days (unless otherwise noted). e-Visa holder must arrive in Japan by air. X

Jordan.notes: Conditions apply.. Not available at all entry points.. X

South Korea.notes: Korean electronic travel authorization for 2 years.. ✓

Kuwait.notes: e-Visa can be obtained for holders of a Residence Permit issued by a GCC member state. X

Kyrgyzstan.notes: Electronic visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart ), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka ), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel ) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk ).. ✓

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings.. X

Latvia.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area; Electronic Travel Declaration required from September 2025 ( https://eta.gov.lv/en/ ). ✓

Lebanon.notes: 1 month extendable for 2 additional months. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket.. X

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Lithuania.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Malta.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Mauritania.notes: Available at Nouakchott–Oumtounsy International Airport.. X

Mexico.notes: Citizens of Saint Kitts and Nevis who hold a valid non-immigrant U.S. visa are allowed into Mexico for a period of 180 days.. X

Morocco.notes: May apply for an e-Visa if holding a valid visa or a residency document issued by one of the following countries: Schengen Area, Australia, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand, United Kingdom, United States a residency document issued by Cyprus, Japan, United Arab Emirates. ✓

Nauru.notes: Visa Issuance: Passengers with an entry permit letter (visa letter) issued by Nauru. Applications can be submitted via email before departure. ✓

Nepal.notes: Not available at all entry points.. X

Netherlands.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

New Zealand.notes: Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure.. X

Norway.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Pakistan.notes: Issued free of charge as of August 2024.. ✓

Poland.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Portugal.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Romania.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of the first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Rwanda.notes: Visa waiver agreement was signed in April 2018 and it is yet to come into force.. X

Saint Lucia.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states. ID card valid.

Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states. ID card valid.

Serbia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period. X

Sierra Leone.notes: An agreement on mutual visa-free visits for 90 days was signed in February 2017 and is yet to be ratified.. X

Slovakia.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Slovenia.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel. X

Spain.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Sri Lanka.notes: The standard visitor visa allows a stay of 60 days within any 6-month period.. Visa fees (for Standard visitor visa): SAARC - USD 35. Non SAARC - USD 75.. e-Visa categories will be charged an additional USD 18.50 service fee.. If transiting from any of the Sri Lankan airports, An e-Visa is exempted (2 day transit period).. X

Sudan.notes: Can obtain a visa upon arrival if married to a national of Sudan or prove that are of Sudanese origins from the father's side.. ✓

Suriname.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely.. ✓

Sweden.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Switzerland.notes: 90 days during 180 days period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area;. ✓

Timor-Leste.notes: Not available at all entry points.. X

Trinidad and Tobago.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely.. ✓

Turkey.notes: please refer to the website of MOFA -Turkey.. X

Turkmenistan.notes: Visa Issuance: Passengers with a letter of invitation issued by a company registered in Turkmenistan and approved by the State Foreign Ministry of Turkmenistan can obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 10 days. They can apply to extend their stay for an additional 10 days. ✓

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry. May apply online.. ✓

Vatican City.notes: Open borders but de facto follows Italian visa policy.. ✓

Vietnam.notes: 30 days visa-free when visiting Phú Quốc. ✓

Yemen.notes: Saint Kitts and Nevis citizens of Yemeni origin with a Yemeni identification document or proof of Yemeni origin do not need a visa.. ✓

Canada.notes: Citizens of Saint Kitts and Nevis who have held a Canadian visa within the past 10 years or who currently hold a valid non-immigrant U.S. visa can apply for an eTA when arriving by air. They may not enter Canada by land or sea unless holding a valid visa.. X

Mexico.notes: Citizens of Saint Kitts and Nevis who hold a valid non-immigrant U.S. visa are allowed into Mexico for a period of 180 days.. X

Armenia.notes: May apply for a visa on arrival only if holding a valid visa or valid permanent resident permit (resident card) issued by Australia, Belarus, Canada, Gulf Cooperation Council countries, Japan, New Zealand, Russia, Singapore, South Korea, European Union / Schengen Area member states, United Kingdom or United States..
